name: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes delayed insights, leading to missed discounts. We automate vendor performance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting of vendor performance.
target_audience: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month
problem_solved: Lack of timely insights into vendor performance metrics

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Lack of timely insights into vendor performance metrics
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes delayed insights, leading to missed discounts. We automate vendor performance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting of vendor performance.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and reporting of vendor performance

one_liner: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual tracking causes delayed insights, leading to missed discounts. We automate vendor performance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting of vendor performance.
